title: TRANSCENDING HOPE - 211info
text: TRANSCENDING HOPE TRANSCENDING HOPE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a structured housing environment for those seeking recovery from addiction, alcoholism, incarceration, and/or mental health issues. 29 locations, including Aid & Assist Community Restoration, and culturally responsive Latino and Latina housing. 347A 1st Avenue Hillsboro, OR 97123 Eligibility: Must be working towards abstinence Hours: Not applicable Email (971) 449-6793 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 449-6793 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website, email, or call for more information or an appointment. FEES: Varies by house; single occupancy is $800 per month, shared $600. No rent required programs are available. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Services: Ex-Offender Halfway Houses Ex-Offender Halfway Houses * Hispanic/Latino Community Recovery Homes/Halfway Houses Recovery Homes/Halfway Houses * Hispanic/Latino Community Sober Living Homes Sober Living Homes * Hispanic/Latino Community If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. TRANSCENDING HOPE
